title: Dragon Block Apollo Bridge
description:
This mod is a dependency for the Dragon Block Apollo Modpack

The Bridge mod is responsible for linking the Players Client and Server
body:
This mod is a dependency for the Dragon Block Apollo Modpack

This mod will only work when combined with the other mods intended for the modpack

 

The Bridge mod is responsible for linking the Players Client and Server

 

The Official Server contains

- 240 Main Story Quests !Recently Revamped!
- 6 Carefully created races !New Race Majin!
- Human, Saiyan, Half-Saiyan, Namekian, Arcosian, and Majin
- 7+ Forms per Race!
- 4 Servers across North America (3) and Europe (1)
- Multiplayer Questing! (Party / Co-Op Questing) !Recently Revamped!
- Active player base
- And Much More!

Other Platforms to Download on
